name: Kathie Frieman's Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the pan well (8 inch round with 3-inch walls).
2. Whip cream cheese until soft and add sugar, combining until fluffy.
3. Add extracts and eggs, beating until mixed but not overmixed.
4. Chop Oreo cookies into pieces and fold them into the mixture.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and place it in a larger pan with 1 or more inches of water.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes (check after 1 hour and 15 minutes) until the center is set.
7. Cool the cake in the pan of water.
8. When cool, turn the cake upside down onto a plate.
9. Sprinkle with cookie crumbs. Optionally, add chopped Heath bars or Twix bars.
